title: verbascum ancyritanum
intro: Verbascum ancyritanum, also known as Ancyre Mulein or Turkish Mullein, is a plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae) characterized by its yellow flowers and velvety leaves. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Verbascum ancyritanum include its ability to soothe respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment, and is often used in herbal remedies for its antiseptic and expectorant properties.
